scripts.install: concurrently 'npm run install --prefix client' 'npm run install --prefix server'
scripts.dev: concurrently 'npm run dev --prefix client' 'npm run dev --prefix server'
scripts.build: concurrently 'npm run build --prefix client' 'npm run build --prefix server'
scripts.lint: concurrently 'npm run lint --prefix client' 'npm run lint --prefix server'
scripts.format: concurrently 'npm run format --prefix client' 'npm run format --prefix server'
